item.g:description: "Pet Water Dispenser Filter Set (8 Filters + 4 Filters)Core Selling Points - Four-layer vertical filtration system: Non-woven fabric + Maifan stone + activated carbon + microporous cotton, layer by layer purification, effectively filtering hair, impurities and odors - Plug and Play Design: No tools required, replacement can be completed in less than 10 seconds, making it easy for novices to operate - Improved Pet Health: Filtered clean water can reduce the problem of black chin in pets and improve water intake - Long-lasting use: A set of 8 filter elements + 4 filter cotton to meet the needs of long-term use - Strong Adaptability: Suitable for a wide range of stainless steel pet water dispensersProduct Specifications - Overall Filter Element Size: 8.4cm × 4.3cm × 1.0cm (L×W× Thick) - Filter cotton size: 3.2cm × 2.8cm × 0.8cm - Package includes: 8 4-in-1 filter cartridges + 4 replacement filter cottons - Recommended replacement interval: Replace the filter every 4 weeksDetailed Explanation of Four-Layer Filtration System Hierarchy Material Features First Floor Non Woven Fabric Filters hair and bulky impurities Level 2 Mai Fan Stone Absorbs and deodorizes, purifies water quality, and is rich in minerals Level 3 Coir Activated Carbon Removes residual chlorine, odors and discolours Level 4 Microporous cotton Further filters fine impurities and softens water quality How to Use 1. First use: Soak the filter element in clean water for 5 minutes to ensure complete saturation 2. Installation: Open the water dispenser filter tank lid, the filter element (reverse side down), and fasten the lid 3. Replacement Cycle: It is recommended to replace it every 4 weeks to keep the water fresh 4. Precautions: Be sure to make sure the filter element is fully saturated before turning on the water dispenser, otherwise it may cause poor water discharge or overflowUsage Scenarios - Everyday Home: Provide fresh and filtered fresh water for cats and dogs 24 hours a day - Multi-pet households: When multiple pets share a water dispenser, replace the filter element regularly to ensure hygienic water quality Care: Provide higher-quality drinking water for pets with black chins and urinary problems - Sensitive period of seasonal change: During the spring and summer bacterial breeding seasons, change the filter element frequently to prevent gastrointestinal discomfort in petsTips - It must be soaked for 5 minutes before use to allow the filter cartridge to be completely saturated - Turning on the machine without sufficient soaking may cause water flow obstruction and overflow - Clean the water dispenser tank regularly for better use with filter elements - In areas with hard water quality, it is recommended to shorten the replacement cycle appropriately

item.g:title: Ultrasonic Pest Repellent – Rechargeable Indoor Outdoor Device for Pets for Small Pets – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: *Features*: *Upgraded Ultrasonic Repeller*:Tired of dealing with the hassle and potential risks posed by bats nesting in your attic,birds roosting on your porch or patio,or mice/dogs lingering through your kitchen,garage,or camping gear? This ultrasonic bat repellent is engineered to be your all-in-one solution,deterring these animals effectively. Creates an inhospitable environment for them and lets you enjoy your space without unwanted guests. *3 Ultrasonic Speakers & 6 Adjustable Ultrasonic Frequencies*:Adopting advanced 8-36KHz ultrasonic wave range and 3 ultrasonic speakers,this pest control device disrupts bats' ability to navigate, interferes with mice communication and instincts, disturbs birds' natural foraging or nesting behaviors,and annoys dogs with uncomfortable high-frequency sounds to drive them away from your property. The 6 adjustable levels let you fine-tune the performance based on the severity of the pest issue or the size of the area—whether you're dealing with a mild bird problem on your patio, a persistent mouse presence in your garage, bats nesting in your attic, or stray dogs lingering around your yard, you can easily select the optimal setting. *900mAh Rechargeable Battery*: Equipped with a 900mAh rechargeable battery, this rechargeable bird repellent offers an impressive runtime of 70 hours, ensuring long-lasting protection without the hassle of frequent recharges. Suitable for indoors and outdoors, whether you're at home or camping outdoor. *Up To 2055Sq.ft Coverage*:With coverage of up to 2055 square feet,this ultrasonic mouse repeller safeguards large areas and can be placed tabletop or wall mounted,making it ideal for rooms,garages,sheds,or even outdoor spots like patios and campsites—keeping pests at bay wherever you need it. *Safe & Humane*:No chemicals,poisons or odors. This ultrasonic bat deterrent offers a humane pest control solution that drives away bats,birds,and mice without causing them harm. Also safe for kids and women. Friendly Reminder: 1. The repeller should be installed at 80-120cm/31.5-47.24in away from the floor and vertical to the floor. The height will achieve the best effect. 2. Clean the repeller with dry and soft cloth instead of strong impregnant,water or damp cloth. 3. Dropping and striking should be avoided. 4. To increase the effect,one room one repeller is recommended. And for larger rooms like warehouses,two or more repellers will be needed. 5. Please don't worried that the mice and vermin will increase at the beginning,because they are trying to run away from your house after hearing the ultrasonic sound. 6. This product is mainly designed for repelling bats,birds,mice and dogs. While it may deter other pests,effectiveness is most pronounced for these four. 7. It is not recommended for pets like:hamsters,gerbils,guinea pigs,tarantulas,chinchilla,and other rodent-type pets. 8. Please use the repeller continuously for 2-4 weeks to achieve obvious results. 9. This device is not waterproof. If you use it outdoors,please mount it under shade. *Specifications*: Product Type: Ultrasonic Bat Repellent Color: White Material: ABS Quantity: 2Pcs Rated Voltage: 5V Rated Power: 1W Ultrasonic Frequency: 8-36KHz, 6 Adjustable Levels Coverage: Within 90 Sq.m/2055 Sq.ft Built-in Battery: 1Pc 3.7V 900mAh Polymer Battery Charging Time: Around 2H Runtime: Around 70H Charging Cable Length: 29cm/11.42in Per Item Size: 6.5×3×10cm/2.56×1.18×3.94in Per Item Weight: 85g/0.19 lbs 2Pcs Package Size: 13x11x8cm/5.12x4.33x3.15in 2Pcs Package Weight: 240g/0.53lbs *Package Lists*: 2x Rechargeable Bats Exclusion Devices 2x Micro USB Cables 1x User Manual

item.g:title: Waterproof Dog Training Collar – Remote Trainer with Beep, Vibration & Electric Shock for Dogs – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: *Features*: * 3 Training Modes *: Our dog receive collar has 3 extremely efficient and safe training modes(beep,vibration and static shock modes) for you to cultivate a dog basic obedience commands and correct your dog’s inappropriate behaviors. Come with upgraded recording function,you can record a 4S command and control through transmitter. The remote control is equipped with a safety keypad lock to prevent misuse and accidental shock. * 9 Levels of Correction *: Do you fear to hurt your dog in Static Shock Mode? Our Receiver Collar offers adjustable 1-9 static shock and vibration levels for you. Adjust static shock/vibration levels to fit your pet's personality or use tone only mode for training. Note: Beep mode can’t adjust level intensity. Start from the lowest level for better accommodation. * IP65 Waterproof Receiver *: The IP65 waterproof training collar receiver offers your pets maximum flexibility during outdoor activities. (NOTE: Please don't put it in the water for a long time.) The remote also features a 3 channels to support training 3 dogs simultaneously. * 984FT Receiving Range *: Electronic Training Collar for dogs will let you enjoy the training time with your pet in a long distance up to 984ft(no obstacle. You could feel free to train your dog in both in the park,backyard and different rooms. * Wide Applications *: Suitable for pet(6 Month+;Neck Circumference under 25.98in);Weight among 22lbs to 110lbs). Smooth contact points rest gently against your pet's skin to deliver correction when needed. It is recommend use 2-3 times a week when you not use shock function. Our remote training collar strap has reflective coating on the surface, which will reflect the surrounding LED light at night, protecting your dog from traffic accidents and helping you locate your dog. * Long Standby Time *: Our bark collar is rechargeable. About 2 hours rapid charging, standby time of receiver and transmitter up to 15days. Designed with 2 in 1 charging cable, can be conveniently charged via PC, phone charger, laptop, or power bank. Note: Adapter not included. Warm Notes: *Proper fit of the collar is important! A collar worn for too long or made too tight on the pet's neck may cause skin irritation. The receiver collar should fit snugly yet be sufficiently loose to allow one finger to fit between the strap and your pet’s neck. * Please make sure to use the conductive silicone set,this will protect the dog's skin to a certain extent, but it does not affect the electric shock function. * Avoid leaving the collar on the dog for more than 18 hours per day. If possible, reposition the collar on the pet's neck every 1 to 2 hours. * We suggest not using the shock function except in an emergency. When using the shock function,Level 1 should be tried first and then the level should be gradually increased as necessary. * If the collar is too long,please cut off the excessive portion. It is pretty easy to get a burn edge after the cut.
